json-schema-validator.description: JSON Schema validation engine (draft-2020-12 support, format checking)

http-sdk-core.description: Core HTTP client SDK with platform detection (darwin/windows), abort handling, utf-8 encoding

connection-transport.description: WebSocket/delegate connection transport layer with base64 encoding, reconnection logic

tool-permissions.description: Tool execution permission system - approval/rejection flows, user settings

oauth-auth-provider.description: OAuth authentication provider - client_secret_post, authorization flows

mcp-transport.description: MCP protocol transport layer (StdioClientTransport, SSEClientTransport, StreamableHTTPClientTransport)

mcp-tools-integration.description: MCP tools integration - tool_use, skills parsing, MCP protocol handling

llm-sdk-providers.description: LLM SDK provider implementations - Anthropic, Google VertexAI, token counting, generationConfig, model configuration

web-streams-polyfill.description: Web Streams API implementation - ReadableStream, WritableStream, state machines (readable/writable/errored/closed)

cli-command-router.description: CLI command routing - amp.chat command dispatch, system command handling

prompt-classification.description: Prompt classification and workflow routing - intent detection, senior engineer mode, multi-step execution

tool-execution-engine.description: Tool execution engine - tool_use, tool:data events, ThreadWorker, cancellation handling

otel-instrumentation.description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation - tracing, span management, telemetry collection

skills-agents-system.description: Skills and agents system - SKILL.md loading, .agents directory, skill registration

protobuf-mime-types.description: Protocol buffer encoding and MIME type detection - file extension mapping, magic byte detection, proto message serialization

rpc-protocol-layer.description: RPC protocol layer - ActionRequest, StateRequest, ConnectionsRequest, RpcsListRequest, PatchStateRequest, protobuf-based communication

session-management.description: Session management - message queuing, disconnect/reconnect handling, git ls-files integration

file-scanner.description: File system scanner - abort-capable scanning, permission error handling (EPERM, ENOENT, EACCES)

http-request-executor.description: HTTP request executor - SEND/HEAD methods, file operations, connection management

realtime-sync.description: Real-time synchronization - WebSocket client, connected/reconnecting states, clientID-based messaging

process-runner.description: Process runner - child process execution, SIGINT/SIGTERM handling, package manager detection (pnpm/yarn), workspace management

tui-widget-framework.description: TUI widget framework core - Widget (Mn), State (wR), StatefulWidget, SIGWINCH resize, stdout rendering, UTF-8 text processing

app-state-management.description: Application state management - lifecycle states (stopped/archived/paused), live sync, API key management

conversation-ui-logic.description: Conversation UI logic - user/assistant message rendering, progress indicators, cancellation, JSON-based data exchange

clipboard-and-input.description: Clipboard and input handling - xclip/wl-paste integration, ghostty terminal support, mouse wheel events

tui-layout-engine.description: TUI layout engine - build/layout/render/paint pipeline, resize handling, capability detection

tui-render-pipeline.description: TUI render pipeline - paint execution, resize event handling, exit waiting, error recovery

widget-property-system.description: Widget property/styling system - linear/vertical/horizontal layout, word wrapping, size constraints

tui-widget-library.description: TUI widget library - built-in widgets with icons, kinds, aggman integration, in-progress states

micromark-parser.description: Micromark markdown parser - line endings, chunk strings, paragraphs, table rows, code indented blocks, GFM extensions

cli-commander-system.description: CLI commander system - .argument(), .description(), .option(), workspace management, MCP server configuration, streaming

html-sanitizer-repl.description: HTML sanitizer and REPL server (WidgetREPLServer) - tag/attribute validation, smart rendering

tui-thread-widgets.description: TUI thread/conversation widgets - thread rendering, tool descriptions (verb/noun), block characters

permission-rule-defs.description: Permission rule definitions - tool permissions with verb/noun/description, JetBrains plugin rules, marker-based progress tracking

activity-feed-ui.description: Activity feed UI - activity groups, tool results, tool groups, dense layout mode

claude-config-system.description: Claude configuration system - .claude directory, skills, agents, local/global config, workspace detection

cli-entrypoint.description: CLI entrypoint - commander options/descriptions/summaries, interactive mode, worker management, API key handling
